deploy.startCommand: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const db = require('./src/config/database'); const fs = require('fs'); db.query(fs.readFileSync('./migrations/010_add_account_merge.sql','utf8')).then(() => { console.log('Migration 010 done'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.log('Migration 010 skipped:', e.message); process.exit(0); })" && npm start
